overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a hooded character in ancient Egyptian armor walking along a moonlit desert shoreline. The character approaches and passes a small sailboat anchored in shallow turquoise water, with sand dunes visible on the left and a bright full moon illuminating the scene.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline in shallow water, heading toward the distant sailboat

entered.detail: dark rocks and boulders along the water's edge
large desert sand dunes rising on the left side
clear turquoise shallow water reflecting moonlight
small sailboat with triangular sail anchored in the distance
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky desert shoreline at night, with sand dunes visible in the distance on the left. The shallow turquoise water reflects the bright full moon overhead, and a small sailboat is visible far ahead on the water.

events.description: ground surface transitions from rocky shoreline to smooth sand dunes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sandy shore, steadily approaching the sailboat

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from rocky to smooth sand as the character continues along the shore. The sailboat grows larger in the frame as the character approaches, and the sand dunes now dominate the left side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: close approach to sailboat in shallow water

events.description: character walks closely past the sailboat, revealing its full structure
sailboat passes out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the sailboat moored in the shallow water, continuing along the beach

segments.scene_description: The character approaches very close to the sailboat, passing it on the right side. The boat's details become clearly visible before it exits the frame, leaving the character to continue along the moonlit shoreline with only the sand dunes and open water ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit desert shoreline that transitions from a rocky coast to a smooth sandy beach. It begins with the character walking past jagged rocks under a bright full moon, with a distant sailboat floating in shallow turquoise water and sand dunes appearing on the left. As the character advances, the terrain shifts into soft sand and the dunes grow more prominent, while the sailboat steadily increases in size within the frame. The scene then closes in as the character passes directly beside the detailed vessel on the right before it exits the view. Finally, the camera continues forward along the open shoreline, leaving only the vast dunes and the shimmering water ahead.
